name: Deep Mehta
title: Backend Systems & AI Engineering
shortHeadline: CS student focused on backend infrastructure, AI systems, distributed software, production-oriented engineering, and scalable backend architecture.
institutionFull: Indian Institute of Information Technology, Vadodara
bio: Computer Science student focused on backend engineering, AI systems, distributed systems, and production-oriented software. Interested in how scalable systems are architected — from API design, middleware, and database modeling to distributed coordination, vector search, and system behavior under load. Builds practical projects across the backend-AI spectrum, from research intelligence pipelines and RAG platforms to university management systems. Works through problems methodically across DSA platforms. Curious about operating systems, computer networks, database internals, and what makes production systems reliable.

identity.corePositioning: Computer science student focused on backend systems, AI engineering, distributed software, and production-oriented engineering with scalable backend architecture as the through line.
identity.portfolioMessage: A student engineer focused on building production-quality backend systems, exploring AI infrastructure patterns, and developing scalable software through consistent engineering practice.

projectFocus: Building Resyntha and Atlas as flagship projects

engineeringMindset.approach: Focused on building production-quality systems while continuously improving engineering depth and technical understanding.
engineeringMindset.learningStyle: Learns through projects, implementation, experimentation, and deep exploration of system behavior.
engineeringMindset.philosophy: Strong engineering comes from understanding systems deeply, solving problems consistently, and building real applications thoughtfully.
